task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Raw_Data' sheet contains the newly calculated columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the columns '1B', 'TB', 'PA', 'OBP', 'SLG', and 'OPS' added to the 'Raw_Data' sheet with calculated numerical values.

task_completion.description: Verify that OBP, SLG, and OPS are formatted to three decimal places.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the values in the OBP, SLG, and OPS columns; they should display exactly three digits after the decimal point (e.g., 0.345).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Qualified_Hitters' sheet with filtered players.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new sheet tab named 'Qualified_Hitters'. The data in this sheet should include headers and only show players where the 'PA' column value is 300 or greater.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Qualified_Hitters' sheet is sorted by OPS from highest to lowest.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'OPS' column in the 'Qualified_Hitters' sheet; the values should be in strictly descending order from top to bottom.

task_completion.description: Verify that OPS values greater than 0.800 are highlighted with a background color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'OPS' column in the 'Qualified_Hitters' sheet. Cells containing a value strictly greater than 0.800 must have a distinct background color (fill color) applied.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a spreadsheet GUI application to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a spreadsheet application (like LibreOffice Calc) open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or a Python script doing the work.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used spreadsheet formulas for calculations.
integrity.visual_evidence: When a calculated cell is selected, the formula bar should show a spreadsheet formula (e.g., starting with '=') rather than a hardcoded number pasted from an external script.

integrity.description: Verify that the highlighting of OPS > 0.800 was done systematically.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the conditional formatting dialog box being used, or ensure that the background color is consistently applied only to cells > 0.800 without manual painting errors.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected new columns are exactly: '1B', 'TB', 'PA', 'OBP', 'SLG', and 'OPS'. The 'Qualified_Hitters' sheet must filter for PA >= 300, which results in exactly 288 qualified players out of the original 500. The conditional formatting must highlight OPS values strictly > 0.800, which applies to exactly 115 players in the qualified list.
